title: Xtra Crispy Northern Thai Chicken Skillet
description: A buttery and crispy one-pot Thai dish featuring ginger cordial, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal option
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until melted and foamy
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and crispy, about 5-7 minutes
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside on a plate
Add the minced garlic and sliced Thai red pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute
Add the ginger cordial, fish sauce, lime juice, and brown sugar to the skillet, stirring to combine
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 2 minutes
Add the cooked chicken back to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
